actions.name: Bounce (Resolution)

cost.trigger: The user used Bounce (Set Up) as their last Action.

actions.description:
Trigger: The user used Bounce (Set Up) as their last Action.

Effect: The user freely Moves up to triple their Jump total (as per Flight Movement, to not exceed their highest Movement Score doubled) before attacking with this Attack. On hit, the target has a 30% chance of gaining @Affliction[paralysis 5].

actions.name: Bounce (Set-Up)
actions.description: Effect: The user gains +2 EVA Stages for 3 Activations, and freely Moves up to double their Jump total into the air (as per Flight Movement, to not exceed their highest Movement Score) and remains in the air.
